nodes.label: AI as communication refinement tool
nodes.grounding_span: use AI LLM's to help revise and clarify emails to be professional, friendly, and clear

nodes.label: AI as data processing and analysis tool
nodes.grounding_span: use AI programs to sift through wildlife camera trap data (photos) to remove blank photos and categorize different wildlife pictures

nodes.label: AI as research and learning accelerator
nodes.grounding_span: I will go to the LLM's to give a quick breakdown of the main components of the thing I am studying

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I would say it is more collaborative at this point

nodes.label: AI as future autonomous agent
nodes.grounding_span: I am interested in having more AI Agent work in the near future where I could delegate complete tasks to the AI

nodes.label: AI implementation complexity
nodes.grounding_span: it can be difficult not having clearly defined steps to set up AI workflows

nodes.label: Foundational skill maintenance alongside AI
nodes.label_negative: Complete reliance on AI without foundational skills
nodes.grounding_span: we always need to know the correct ways to do things, even if AI starts to do most of the work

nodes.label: AI for field data collection and identification
nodes.label_negative: Traditional field methods with paper and field guides
nodes.grounding_span: we use AI programs for identifying birds, plants, animals, which in the past would require having books and field guides

nodes.label: Professional communication quality
nodes.grounding_span: give a consistently professional voice to all my emails

nodes.label: Epistemic understanding and verified knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: ensure the information I am getting is backed by science

nodes.label: Human connection and strategic collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: face to face meetings with people to strategize

nodes.label: Competence and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: How will we know if the AI went wrong if we don't know ourselves what is right?

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for communication refinement
nodes.grounding_span: use AI LLM's to help revise and clarify emails to be professional, friendly, and clear

nodes.label: Frustration with AI implementation complexity
nodes.grounding_span: it can be difficult not having clearly defined steps to set up AI workflows

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI agent delegation
nodes.grounding_span: I am interested in having more AI Agent work in the near future

nodes.label: Cautious value on maintaining foundational skills
nodes.grounding_span: we always need to know the correct ways to do things, even if AI starts to do most of the work

nodes.label: Systematic hierarchical inquiry — starts broad then drills down
nodes.grounding_span: I start with a general overview question... Then dig deeper into the subject on follow-ups

nodes.label: Verification-oriented approach — seeks sources and knowledge bases
nodes.grounding_span: I will generally always ask for sources of scientific articles... set up the scientific articles as a Knowledge Base
